title: clean up GitHub labels
body:
The list of labels got pretty long. While some can be removed, others seem redundant (e..g, "help wanted" and "contributor wanted").

Cc: @baude @mheon

comments.body:
There are a lot of duplicates for the kind/ set of labels - we have both `bug` and `kind/bug`. In those cases we should prefer `kind/bug` given the bot generates them.

A lot of the old `Release Notes x.y.z` labels can be simply removed.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.

> @vrothberg @mheon Can you clean this up?

Sure!
